ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet (Tweet ID) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) the tweet received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet received */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result in JSON format */,
  "pos_pct" REAL /* Percentage of positive sentiment */,
  "neg_pct" REAL /* Percentage of negative sentiment */,
  "user_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name or handle of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "user_followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "user_friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends or accounts the user follows */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter for iPhone, Twitter Web App) */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the tweet is a retweet */,
  "retweet_of_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the original tweet if this tweet is a retweet */,
  "quoted_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the quoted tweet */,
  "in_reply_to_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet this tweet is in reply to */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user this tweet is in reply to */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of user IDs mentioned in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user for secure authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the tweet */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., favorite, retweet) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_device" TEXT /* Device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "interaction_location" TEXT /* Location from which the interaction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_interactions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment category (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment category */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the sentiment category */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the sentiment category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment category */,
  "compound_score" REAL /* Compound score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "neu_score" REAL /* Neutral score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "pos_score" REAL /* Positive score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "neg_score" REAL /* Negative score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_reason" TEXT /* A brief reason for the sentiment score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_sentiments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES sentiment_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Number of times the hashtag has been used */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the hashtag (e.g., political, social, entertainment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-hashtag relationship */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "occurrence_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the hashtag appears in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url_text" TEXT /* Text of the URL */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the web page linked by the URL */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the web page linked by the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_urls" (
  "tweet_url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-URL relationship */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* ID of the URL */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the URL has been clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_urls_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES urls ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tweet */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the tweet */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the tweet */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
